ddt:Target.Name: DC4_X98_X43_X95_X87_EU5_vdiag08_V2.7
ddt:Target.Description:
BVA DC4 TCU Software version : A1.30 and after (DiagOnCAN) Vehicle : X98 X87 K9Kgen5, X98RS M5Mt, X87 X98 X98GT H5Ft, X95 H5Ft, B95 J95 K9Kgen5, X43 M5Mt August 2015 Authors : M. NICOLAESCU (mihai.nicolaescu@renault.com) E.CONOVALEANU (emilian.conovaleanu-renexter@renault.com) T. GUYOT (timothy.guyot-renexter@renault.com) T. NGUYEN (thao-duy.nguyen-renexter@renault.com) B.BLOJU (bogdan-daniel.bloju-renexter@renault.com) V.CARACIUC (valentin.caraciuc@renault.com) DED DFS v2.7
Historic: A1.00: Based on the DC4_X38_X95_vdiag04_v2.4.xml database. Addition of the following DTCs: 1705 - Shift paddle up 1706 - Shift paddle down 0600 - Serial link Deletion of the DTC $1754 and $0780 A1.30 Based on the DC4_X38_X95_vdiag04_v2.4.xml database. Addition of the following DTCs: $AAAA, $AAAB, $AAAC, $AAAD, $AAAE, $AAAF, $AAB0, $AAB1 Deletion of the DTC: $AAAA - Sotfware reset A1.40 Based on the DC4_X38_X95_vdiag04_v2.4.xml database. Addition of the following DTCs: $1804, $1805, $1806, $1807, $1808, $1809, $1810, $1811, $1812, $1813, $1814, $1815, $1830, $1831, $1832, $1833, $1834, $1835, $1836, $1837, $1838, $1839, $1850, $1851, $1852, $1853, $1854, $1855, $1856, $1857, $1860, $1861, $1862, $1863, $1864, $1865, $1866, $1867, $1869, $1870, $1871, $1872, $1890, $1891, $1892, $1893, $1894, $1895, $1896, $1897, $1898, $1899, $1900, $1901, $1902, $1903, $1910, $1911, $1912, $1913, $1914, $1915, $1916, $1917
Deletion of the DTCs: $0641, $0705, $0826, $0880, $1740, $1741, $1745, $1746, $1750, $1751, $1752, $1753, $1770, $1771, $1775, $1776
A4.6: DTC Addition 1873 & 1874 DTC name correction. Database adaptation for new officialization requirements.
DED DFS v1.9 Set clutch green flag routine added for Clutch 1 and 2 Engage appropriate gears routine added for Clutch 1 and 2 Clutch torque cycle control request added for Clutch 1 and 2.
A5.1: HMLGT added for homologation ident Freeze Frame added: AAAB, AAB1,AAAC, AAAD, AAAE, AAAF, AAB0, AAAA,1772, 1773, 1705, 1706, 0600, 1874
V.2.4 Added request 3062 - Shiftdrum motor PWM control
V.2.5 Update of service $30, LID $62
V.2.6 Modified ApprovalNumber data: for 0 is N/A Added $22 PID $345F IUPR data Added IUPR data X43 screen Added $3B2901000001 Added $3B2902000001 Added "Steps after MAM replacement" screens Added "Steps after CLUTCH replacement" screens Modified $3B2F01000002 Modified $3B2F02000002 Modified $313E000009000B00010001 Modified $313E000001000700010001
V2.7:
Requests format modified for: $31$05 $31$0D $3B$2C --> removed additional byte from response Request deleted acording to supplier specification and validation on car: 3B0000000000 Screens for MAM aftersales replacement and Clutch replacement, reworked to correspond to Getrag specifications, to be more user friendly and to avoid entering continuos loops Updated clutch touchpoint screen with reference values Format correction to data "Engine coolant temperature" associated to $21A4 Screen Clutch 2 touchpoint value correction mistype Check TRS screen added Clutch motor test & replacement screen added Check shift lever component screen added Method to check paddles screen added Check Input Shaft Speed screen added Removed old teaching screens from aftersales group Removed $2142 tsl counters part 1, because the request was doubled and this version hadn't the correct format New format and data associated to 2141, 2143,2144,2145,2146,2148

Screen.Name: Manual procedure for ISS1 and ISS2 checking

Label.Text: Shift lever | Ignition ON | Engine running | Gear 1 pre-engaged | R pre-engaged
Move lever in R position and drive backward
Check ISS2 speed while vehicle is moving
If ISS1 speed value is positive and varies while driving, ISS1 is OK
Move lever in D position and drive forward
Check ISS1 speed while vehicle is moving
If ISS2 speed value varies while driving, ISS2 is OK
Shift lever Ignition ON Engine running R gear pre-engaged
Move lever in R position and drive backward
Check ISS1 speed while vehicle is moving
If ISS1 speed is negative, ISS1 direction detection is OK
Shift lever in Manual Ignition ON Engine Not running
With lever in Manual position pull the lever in order to obtain a + Gear
With lever in Manual position push the lever in order to obtain a - Gear
If the two checks above, give a positive result, TRS is OK
If only one of these fails, proceed to screen: "Reference TRS Shift Lever position"

Manually shift the lever in the positions P, R, N, D and check the values below:
